# Dancing with the Aurorae
## Scripture
"For the Lord is the great God, the great King above all gods." - Psalm 95:3

## Reflection
As we gaze upon the breathtaking display of the Northern Lights, we are reminded of the awe-inspiring glory of God. The dancing aurorae, with their shimmering curtains of green and purple, evoke a sense of wonder and reverence. Just as the Northern Lights illuminate the night sky, God's presence illuminates our lives, guiding us through the darkest of times. The intricate patterns and colors of the aurorae reflect the beauty and complexity of God's creation, pointing us to the greatness of our Creator.

## Prayer
Dear Heavenly Father, as we marvel at the majesty of the Northern Lights, we are humbled by the reminder of Your greatness. Help us to behold Your glory in all aspects of creation, and to recognize Your presence in our lives. Just as the aurorae dance across the sky, may our hearts dance with joy and reverence for You. May we reflect Your beauty and light to a world in need, and may our lives be a testament to Your greatness. Amen.
